title: rubus × macrocardiacus
intro: Rubus × macrocardiacus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus and is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The medicinal properties of Rubus × macrocardiacus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × macrocardiacus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Rubus × macrocardiacus can be prepared as herbal teas, jams, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
